commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the lint blocker, but maintainers still need to review the secrets-forwarding suppression before merge.; Needs attention: The hardening direction is security-positive, but the new secrets-inherit suppression needs maintainer security review before merge.; Review finding: [P2] Use a lint-compliant workflow file ordering — scripts/check-workflows.mjs:31 (sha=7ecf0c4aece1b32c9c124dc8872516134a30fbfc)
commands.review_summary:
The PR hoists the Windows Testbox target ref into step env, adds a scoped zizmor suppression for one reusable workflow secrets handoff, broadens Workflow Sanity and `check:workflows` to audit all workflow YAML with zizmor, and updates CI docs/tests.

PR surface: Tests +17, Docs +1, Config +70, Other +36. Total +124 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and supplied proof: current main still interpolates `inputs.target_ref` directly inside the Windows probe run block, and the PR body includes before/after terminal output for `pnpm check:workflows`. I did not execute the workflow check locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the lint blocker, but maintainers still need to review the secrets-forwarding suppression before merge.
